title: adjutant_result
description: v1. The structured result the Adjutant composes after executing (or failing) a task, before submitting it through the capture pipeline. Not a vault record type: this is the contract between executor and reporter. (Spec named this adjutant_result_v1.json; repo convention is *.schema.json with the version documented here.)

verdict_path.description: The gate rule chain that authorized this execution.
